title: About
text:
Introduction
I am Lennart, a Master’s student of Data Science with an interest in quantitative and computational methods of Political Science. I work as a research assistant for Max Schaub at the University of Hamburg, currently on the generational effect of wartime victimization on interpersonal trust and social norms.
Here, I mostly write about R & Python programming, and software I recommend. Thanks for stopping by!
Github: kssrr
ORCiD: 0009-0007-0052-5973
Mail: lennart.kasserra@uni-hamburg.de

title: Datasets
text:
German Media Scrape
One million German language news articles, from 01/2020 to 12/2022, scraped from five big German news websites: Spiegel, WELT, Die Zeit, Süddeutsche & taz.

More information & code
Download

title: Publications
text:
Schaub, M., Abreu, L., Adeyanju, G. C., Abulfathi, A. A., Bello, M. M., Kasserra, L., Kwaku, A.A., Jalo, M.I., Mahmud, A., Schrage, P. & Jalo, R. I. (2026). Can trust in healthcare be restored after armed violence? Evidence from a randomized field experiment in north-eastern Nigeria. Social Science & Medicine, Advance online publication. Link
Schaub, M., Greiner-Filsinger, A., Henic, A., & Kasserra, L. (2025). Exposure to wartime sexual violence in Bosnia and Herzegovina: nationally representative prevalence 30 years after the 1992–1995 war. Conflict and Health, 19. Link
Schaub, M., Adeyanju, G. C., Abulfathi, A. A., Bello, M. M., Kasserra, L., Kwaku, A. A., Jalo, M.I., Mahmud, A., Schrage, P., Jalo, R.I. & Abreu, L. (2025). Maternal and child healthcare-seeking among victims of violence in armed conflict: a quasi-experimental study in Northeast Nigeria. BMJ global health, 10(12). Link

title: Tidyverse-Workshop
text:
Data Manipulation and Visualization with R
Introductory R-Workshop about data cleaning & manipulation techniques, as well as visualizations in R using the tidyverse.
Link to the repository
